pi_items.source: OpenMRS documentation (HL7 Import Process) indicates the official task name is 'HL7 In Queue Processor' or 'Process HL7 Task', not 'HL7 Inbound Queue Processor'
Verified as reasonable optimization target; standard scheduler intervals in OpenMRS use second-based granularity
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which sets INITIAL_INTERVAL=5 seconds
OpenMRS documentation confirms /openmrs/admin is the correct administration interface path
Confirmed as default Bahmni/OpenMRS admin username in Bahmni documentation and implementation guides
Confirmed as default password for Bahmni/OpenMRS Reference Application in official documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a Bahmni EHR system with default credentials (username: superman, password: Admin123). The target is to modify a scheduler task interval from 5 seconds to 300 seconds (5 minutes). The task name in metadata is listed as 'HL7 Inbound Queue Processor' but OpenMRS documentation refers to this component as 'HL7 In Queue Processor'. The admin interface is accessed via https://localhost/openmrs/admin. The environment uses a self-signed SSL certificate. The task modifies the scheduler_task_config database table to update the repeat_interval field.
